plugins.name: kms-mcp-patterns
plugins.description: Design patterns for building MCP servers

plugins.name: kms-docs
plugins.description: A documentation pipeline: the writing-documentation rulebook plus a /write-doc command that orchestrates source grounding, drafting, bundled Playwright screenshot capture with a code-enforced data-leak guard, cross-model fact-check/edit/coverage review, and revision with two human gates

plugins.name: kms-human-voice
plugins.description: Self-contained writing style enforcement: anti-AI phrase blacklist, em-dash limits, contrastive framing bans, hedging and throat-clearing, intensity modulation, structural prose tells, and direct communication

plugins.name: insight-essay-bot
plugins.description: Analytical essay writing and editing skills: kontextmaschine-style system excavations that reveal the material, institutional, and economic machinery behind everyday subjects
